name: IOR MDTest Storage Smoke
summary: Collect small IOR and MDTest storage benchmark evidence on Slurm.
description: This skill provides a conservative pattern for running tiny IOR and MDTest smoke benchmarks from Slurm allocations, recording the exact commands, target directory, tool versions, and cleanup notes needed for storage or performance support triage.

tools.name: sbatch
tools.notes: Used to run the benchmark smoke test in a scheduled allocation.

tools.name: srun
tools.notes: Default MPI launcher for Slurm-managed tasks.

tools.name: ior
tools.notes: Runs the tiny POSIX file I/O smoke benchmark.

tools.name: mdtest
tools.notes: Runs the tiny filesystem metadata smoke benchmark.

tools.name: mkdir
tools.notes: Creates the marked benchmark run directory.

tools.name: tee
tools.notes: Captures command output while leaving it visible in the Slurm log.

tools.name: rm
tools.notes: Used only by the explicit cleanup helper after marker checks.

inputs.name: bench_root
inputs.description: Scratch or project directory approved for tiny I/O benchmark output.

inputs.name: task_count
inputs.description: Small MPI task count for the smoke benchmark.

inputs.name: ior_sizes
inputs.description: Small IOR transfer, block, and segment settings.

inputs.name: site_policy
inputs.description: Local policy confirmation represented by the explicit CONFIRM_STORAGE_POLICY=1 execution gate.

outputs.name: run_directory
outputs.description: Marked directory containing metadata, commands, IOR output, MDTest output, and summaries.

outputs.name: benchmark_evidence
outputs.description: Tiny benchmark output suitable for support triage, not for site-wide performance claims.

examples.title: Plan or run a tiny IOR and MDTest smoke benchmark on Slurm
Check Slurm, IOR, MDTest, and target directory prerequisites
Summarize captured IOR and MDTest output
Clean up a marked benchmark run directory
Review site policy before running storage benchmarks

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Check that the summary helper parses.
Require a complete marked synthetic IOR and MDTest result bundle.
After site approval, submit the plan-only job, then run with RUN_BENCHMARK=1 in a short allocation and remove the marked run directory after preserving outputs.

references.title: IOR first steps and cache notes
